title: Cloudflare MCP security and token-economy planning
body: Opened claim c78e6407-49b5-478b-9f42-19b41d62b7d2 to add a security-focused Cloudflare MCP future plan and map Cloudflare Code Mode token-reduction patterns onto Oak's generated MCP tool surface. Planned edits are limited to security-and-privacy and sdk-and-mcp-enhancements planning/index docs plus the high-level plan reference.
